title: Confirmation summary must include time and price — no vague 'booking received' message
failing_behavior: Early versions of the booking confirmation showed only 'Your appointment request has been sent. The salon will confirm shortly.' — no time, no price, no booking reference. Customers were left unsure what was booked.
root_cause: The original EscalationEngine.create() flow wrote to an 'escalations' collection and showed a 'pending vendor confirmation' message. Switched to _submitDirectBooking which generates a full booking packet (service, staff, date, time, price, reference ID, calendar links) and shows it instantly.
precondition: biz._bookingDraft = {services:['Gel Manicure'], staff:'Tracy', date:'2026-04-13', time:'14:00', name:'Sarah', phone:'4085559876', lang:'en'}. Slot is available. [ESCALATE:appointment] has been emitted.
notes: _buildBookingPacketHtml renders a card with service/staff/date/time/price/location/phone/ref and calendar buttons. _buildConfirmedNatural provides the text message above the card. Both are shown to the customer immediately after booking — no vendor confirmation wait.
